title: Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam
tagline: Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Antony's Forane Church (also known as Kannamaly Pally) is a historic Catholic Latin Church pilgrimage church located in Kannamaly, a coastal suburb of Kochi, in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. The church is administered by the Diocese of Cochin, and is known for St. Joseph's Miraculous Shrine, which is attached to it.

topPlaces.name: Kannamaly
topPlaces.description: Kannamaly is a coastal suburb of Kochi situated in Chellanam Panchayat in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It comes under the Kochi taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kumbalangi
topPlaces.description: Kumbalangi (Malayalam: [kumbɐɭɐŋːi]) is an island village in the outskirts of Kochi city in the state of Kerala, India. Situated amidst backwaters, around 12 km (7.5 mi) from the city center, Kumbalangi is a major tourist attraction and is famous for its Chinese fishing nets.

topPlaces.name: Perumpadappu, Ernakulam
topPlaces.description: Perumpadappu is a small area of Palluruthy region of Cochin city of Ernakulam district, Kerala. It is about 4 km2 in area and has three Hindu temples, two churches and a mosque.

topPlaces.name: Aroor
topPlaces.description: Aroor is a fishing village on the northernmost part of the Alappuzha district, within Cherthala taluk of Kerala, India. It lies on either sides of National Highway 66 and serves as a gateway between Kochi and Alappuzha.

topPlaces.name: St. Lawrence Church, Edacochin
topPlaces.description: St. Lawrence Church, Edacochin, is a church in the Roman Catholic Diocese of Cochin in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Palluruthy
topPlaces.description: Palluruthy is a region in the city of Kochi, in the state of Kerala, India. Palluruthy is part of the water bound West Kochi, lying westward to the Kochi mainland.

topPlaces.name: St Louis Church, Mundamveli
topPlaces.description: St. Louis Church (Saantiyago Church) is located in Mundamveli, Kochi in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Chandiroor
topPlaces.description: Chandiroor is a village in Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It is situated on National Highway 66 (India) between Eramalloor and Aroor.

items.note: Kannamaly is a coastal suburb of Kochi situated in Chellanam Panchayat in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It comes under the Kochi taluk.

Kumbalangi (Malayalam: [kumbɐɭɐŋːi]) is an island village in the outskirts of Kochi city in the state of Kerala, India. Situated amidst backwaters, around 12 km (7.5 mi) from the city center, Kumbalangi is a major tourist attraction and is famous for its Chinese fishing nets.
Perumpadappu is a small area of Palluruthy region of Cochin city of Ernakulam district, Kerala. It is about 4 km2 in area and has three Hindu temples, two churches and a mosque.

Aroor is a fishing village on the northernmost part of the Alappuzha district, within Cherthala taluk of Kerala, India. It lies on either sides of National Highway 66 and serves as a gateway between Kochi and Alappuzha.
St. Lawrence Church, Edacochin, is a church in the Roman Catholic Diocese of Cochin in Kerala, India.
Palluruthy is a region in the city of Kochi, in the state of Kerala, India. Palluruthy is part of the water bound West Kochi, lying westward to the Kochi mainland.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam?
faq.a: Stays in Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kannamaly Church, Ernakulam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kannamaly, Kumbalangi, Perumpadappu, Ernakulam, Aroor, St. Lawrence Church, Edacochin.
